sections.name: section_navbar
sections.structure: 7-layer: page-wrapper > main-wrapper > section_navbar > padding-global > container-large > padding-section-small > navbar_component

sections.name: section_blog_hero
sections.structure: 7-layer: page-wrapper > main-wrapper > section_blog_hero > padding-global > container-large > padding-section-large > blog_hero_component

sections.name: section_blog_list
sections.structure: 7-layer: page-wrapper > main-wrapper > section_blog_list > padding-global > container-large > padding-section-large > blog_list_component

sections.name: section_footer
sections.structure: 7-layer: page-wrapper > main-wrapper > section_footer > padding-global > container-large > padding-section-medium > footer_component

fixes_applied: Implemented mandatory 7-layer architecture for the entire Blog page.
Phase 1 (Variables): Created and bound Webflow variables for all color design tokens.
Phase 2 (Transform): Standardized layout decision making (Flex vs Grid).
Phase 3 (Construct): Built DOM using clean, pre-defined classes to ensure zero class suffixes.
Banned usage of HEX codes in style definitions, using variable_as_value instead.
Verified visual fidelity and semantic tag usage.
